mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, product_id, quantity, status, created_at FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (user_id, product_id, quantity, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
